entries.name: filesystem
entries.description: Browse, read, and write local files. Official MCP reference server.
entries.description_zh: 浏览、读取和写入本地文件。MCP 官方参考服务器。

entries.name: github
entries.description: Read/write GitHub issues, PRs, files. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN.
entries.description_zh: 读写 GitHub 的 issue、PR 和文件。需要 GITHUB_TOKEN。

entries.name: postgres
entries.description: Query Postgres databases by URI. Read-only by default.
entries.description_zh: 通过 URI 查询 Postgres 数据库。默认只读。

entries.name: sqlite
entries.description: Query and modify SQLite databases. Includes schema introspection. Python.
entries.description_zh: 查询和修改 SQLite 数据库,含表结构自省。Python 实现。

entries.name: obsidian
entries.description: Browse, search, create, edit, and tag notes in an Obsidian vault. Community server (StevenStavrakis/obsidian-mcp, ~710 stars, MIT). Read AND write capable — back up the vault (git or otherwise) before pointing this at it. Edit the second arg below to your vault's absolute path; the server takes the vault path as a positional CLI argument, not an env var. xiaoguai's first-party write-safe Obsidian connector is on the v1.1+ roadmap; until then, use this and rely on backups.
entries.description_zh: 在 Obsidian 仓库中浏览、搜索、创建、编辑和打标签。社区服务器(StevenStavrakis/obsidian-mcp,约 710 星,MIT)。可读可写——指向仓库前请先备份。把下方第二个参数改成你仓库的绝对路径;该服务器以位置参数(而非环境变量)接收仓库路径。xiaoguai 自带的写安全 Obsidian 连接器在 v1.1+ 路线图上,在此之前请用本服务器并依赖备份。

entries.name: slack
entries.description: Read channels and send messages. Requires Slack bot token.
entries.description_zh: 读取频道并发送消息。需要 Slack bot token。

entries.name: fetch
entries.description: Fetch web pages and return the cleaned content. Official MCP reference server (Python).
entries.description_zh: 抓取网页并返回清理后的内容。MCP 官方参考服务器(Python)。

entries.name: memory
entries.description: Lightweight knowledge graph in-memory store. Useful for prototyping persistent agent memory.
entries.description_zh: 轻量级内存知识图谱存储,适合为持久化 agent 记忆做原型。

entries.name: VMware Monitor (read-only)
entries.description: Read-only vSphere/vCenter/ESXi monitoring: inventory, alarms, events, host/VM health. Code-level enforced safety, zero destructive ops. Requires `uv tool install vmware-monitor` and host-side config (`~/.vmware-monitor/config.yaml` + `.env` with vCenter hosts + credentials).
entries.description_zh: 只读 vSphere/vCenter/ESXi 监控:库存、告警、事件、主机/虚机健康。代码级强制安全,零破坏性操作。需先 `uv tool install vmware-monitor`,并在主机配置 `~/.vmware-monitor/config.yaml` + `.env`(vCenter 主机与凭据)。

entries.name: VMware AIOps (operations)
entries.description: VM lifecycle/deploy/guest-ops/cluster. Destructive ops (power-off/delete/reconfigure/snapshot-revert/clone/migrate) require 2 sequential confirmations, no bypass. Requires `uv tool install vmware-aiops` and host-side config (`~/.vmware-aiops/config.yaml` + `.env` with vCenter hosts + credentials).
entries.description_zh: 虚机生命周期/部署/客户机操作/集群。破坏性操作(关机/删除/重配/快照回滚/克隆/迁移)需 2 次连续确认,无法绕过。需先 `uv tool install vmware-aiops`,并在主机配置 `~/.vmware-aiops/config.yaml` + `.env`(vCenter 主机与凭据)。

entries.name: VMware Storage
entries.description: Datastores, iSCSI, vSAN. Requires `uv tool install vmware-storage` and host-side config (`~/.vmware-storage/config.yaml` + `.env` with vCenter hosts + credentials).
entries.description_zh: 数据存储、iSCSI、vSAN。需先 `uv tool install vmware-storage`,并在主机配置 `~/.vmware-storage/config.yaml` + `.env`(vCenter 主机与凭据)。

entries.name: VMware VKS (Tanzu)
entries.description: vSphere with Tanzu (VKS): Supervisor, Namespace, TanzuKubernetesCluster lifecycle. Requires `uv tool install vmware-vks` and host-side config (`~/.vmware-vks/config.yaml` + `.env` with vCenter hosts + credentials).
entries.description_zh: vSphere with Tanzu(VKS):Supervisor、Namespace、TanzuKubernetesCluster 生命周期。需先 `uv tool install vmware-vks`,并在主机配置 `~/.vmware-vks/config.yaml` + `.env`(vCenter 主机与凭据)。

entries.name: VMware NSX
entries.description: NSX networking: segments, gateways, NAT, routing, IPAM. Requires `uv tool install vmware-nsx` and host-side config (`~/.vmware-nsx/config.yaml` + `.env` with vCenter hosts + credentials).
entries.description_zh: NSX 网络:网段、网关、NAT、路由、IPAM。需先 `uv tool install vmware-nsx`,并在主机配置 `~/.vmware-nsx/config.yaml` + `.env`(vCenter 主机与凭据)。

entries.name: VMware NSX Security
entries.description: NSX DFW microsegmentation: distributed firewall, security groups, tags, traceflow, IDPS. Requires `uv tool install vmware-nsx-security` and host-side config (`~/.vmware-nsx-security/config.yaml` + `.env` with vCenter hosts + credentials).
entries.description_zh: NSX DFW 微分段:分布式防火墙、安全组、标签、Traceflow、IDPS。需先 `uv tool install vmware-nsx-security`,并在主机配置 `~/.vmware-nsx-security/config.yaml` + `.env`(vCenter 主机与凭据)。

entries.name: VMware Aria Operations
entries.description: Aria Operations monitoring, alerting, capacity planning. Requires `uv tool install vmware-aria` and host-side config (`~/.vmware-aria/config.yaml` + `.env` with vCenter hosts + credentials).
entries.description_zh: Aria Operations 监控、告警、容量规划。需先 `uv tool install vmware-aria`,并在主机配置 `~/.vmware-aria/config.yaml` + `.env`(vCenter 主机与凭据)。

entries.name: VMware AVI (NSX ALB)
entries.description: AVI (NSX Advanced Load Balancer) + AKO Kubernetes operations. Requires `uv tool install vmware-avi` and host-side config (`~/.vmware-avi/config.yaml` + `.env` with vCenter hosts + credentials).
entries.description_zh: AVI(NSX 高级负载均衡器)+ AKO Kubernetes 操作。需先 `uv tool install vmware-avi`,并在主机配置 `~/.vmware-avi/config.yaml` + `.env`(vCenter 主机与凭据)。

entries.name: VMware Harden
entries.description: VMware compliance baseline enforcement. Requires `uv tool install vmware-harden` and host-side config (`~/.vmware-harden/config.yaml` + `.env` with vCenter hosts + credentials).
entries.description_zh: VMware 合规基线强制执行。需先 `uv tool install vmware-harden`,并在主机配置 `~/.vmware-harden/config.yaml` + `.env`(vCenter 主机与凭据)。

entries.name: VMware Debug (read-only)
entries.description: Read-only VMware incident correlation: timeline, spikes, root-cause routing (2 MCP tools). Requires `uv tool install vmware-debug` and host-side config (`~/.vmware-debug/config.yaml` + `.env` with vCenter hosts + credentials).
entries.description_zh: 只读 VMware 事故关联分析:时间线、异常尖峰、根因路由(2 个 MCP 工具)。需先 `uv tool install vmware-debug`,并在主机配置 `~/.vmware-debug/config.yaml` + `.env`(vCenter 主机与凭据)。

entries.name: VMware Log Insight (read-only)
entries.description: Read-only VMware Aria Operations for Logs (Log Insight): log search + aggregation (7 MCP tools). Requires `uv tool install vmware-log-insight` and host-side config (`~/.vmware-log-insight/config.yaml` + `.env`).
entries.description_zh: 只读 VMware Aria Operations for Logs(Log Insight):日志搜索与聚合(7 个 MCP 工具)。需先 `uv tool install vmware-log-insight`,并在主机配置 `~/.vmware-log-insight/config.yaml` + `.env`。
